trigger_keywords: función del SO₂ durante la vinificación

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Sulfur dioxide is added at a controlled stage and dose during winemaking.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: SO2 binds oxidation products and limits oxidative reactions while also suppressing unwanted microorganisms.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Fruit freshness, colour, and aroma are better protected from oxidation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Fruit freshness, colour, and aroma are better protected from oxidation.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
